0222212112002010001111021 - ASI: 20

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  02 = 0 * 2
  11 = 1 * 1
  12 = 1 * 2
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  000 = 0 * 00
  021 = 0 * 21
  0222 = 02 * 22
  1200 = 12 * 00
  2121 = 21 * 21
  01000 = 01 * 000
  11021 = 11 * 021
  201000 = 2 * 01000
  1111021 = 11 * 11021
  21211200 = 2121 * 1200
  022221211200 = 0222 * 21211200
  2010001111021 = 201000 * 1111021
  0222212112002010001111021 = 022221211200 * 2010001111021
